final_prompt.prompt:
Design a 3×3 grid poster for Xiaohongshu sharing, a 9-panel sleep-wellness knowledge carousel with clean, premium, feminine lifestyle aesthetic.

Style/medium: Xiaohongshu carousel grid poster, editorial social media design, light skeuomorphic illustration, magazine-quality layout
Composition: 3 columns × 3 rows grid layout, clear panel boundaries with visible spacing/borders for clean cutting, each panel self-contained and centered, generous whitespace, large readable typography
Subject: 9-panel sleep tips infographic — Panel 1 cover "让你倒头就睡的8个 tips" with subtitle "失眠党、熬夜党一定要收藏"; Panels 2-8 numbered tips 1-8 with titles and body copy; Panel 9 tip 8 with closing note "收藏这组，今晚试试看"
Scene/backdrop: soft sleep-themed elements per panel — bed/moon/pillow/eye mask (panel 1), phone/moon (panel 2), bedside lamp/curtains (panel 3), AC/thermometer/blanket (panel 4), coffee cup/tea cup (panel 5), bathroom steam/towel (panel 6), notebook/pen/lamp (panel 7), clock/moon/bed (panel 8), breathing lines/closed eyes/stars (panel 9)
Lighting/mood: warm, soothing, sleep-healing atmosphere, gentle and calming
Color palette: cream white, light beige, pale oatmeal, soft caramel as dominant tones, dark brown for text accents, warm and healing palette
Materials/textures: soft fabric textures, paper-like surfaces, gentle shadows, light 3D skeuomorphic elements
Text (verbatim): 让你倒头就睡的8个 tips / 失眠党、熬夜党一定要收藏 / 1. 睡前1小时别玩手机 / 蓝光会让大脑更清醒，越刷越睡不着。 / 2. 睡前把灯光调暗 / 暖光环境能帮助身体进入"准备睡觉"的状态。 / 3. 房间温度别太高 / 稍微凉一点，更容易快速入睡。 / 4. 晚上别喝浓茶咖啡 / 咖啡因会延迟困意，让你躺很久还睡不着。 / 5. 睡前洗个热水澡 / 能让身体放松下来，入睡速度更快。 / 6. 脑子停不下来就写下来 / 把烦心事和待办清单写下，大脑会更容易放松。 / 7. 固定上床时间 / 每天差不多时间睡，生物钟会越来越稳定。 / 8. 试试深呼吸放松法 / 吸气4秒，停4秒，呼气6秒，慢慢就有困意了。 / 收藏这组，今晚试试看
Constraints: 3:4 vertical aspect ratio (9-panel grid), all text in Chinese, no English, no text near cut lines, each panel must work as standalone Xiaohongshu card, professional new-media aesthetic, ready-to-cut for posting
Avoid: cheap marketing look, over-decorative elements, cluttered layout, text too close to grid borders, generic stock photo style
